name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), and title loans ($2,000-$25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term and secured lending products for consumers needing quick access to cash. The company operates physical storefronts, including one in Jacksonville, FL, and provides online lending options across multiple loan categories. Founded as a regional provider, Advance America has grown into a multi-state operation serving millions of customers with emergency funding needs.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2-4 week terms, $100-$500), Installment Loans (flexible repayment schedules, $100-$1,000), and Title Loans (secured by vehicle equity, $2,000-$25,000 online). Payday and Installment Loans are available both in-store and online, while Title Loans are offered online and in partnership with LoanCenter. All products promise same-day or rapid funding. The Jacksonville location operates extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) and provides bilingual customer service.

Advance America distinguishes itself through physical store presence, established brand recognition (125,448 Google reviews averaging 4.9 stars), and a tiered loan structure accommodating different borrowing needs. The company emphasizes customer service quality and maintains standardized application requirements (government ID, proof of income, checking account, SSN/ITIN). They also offer ancillary services like Western Union money transfers and maintain a referral rewards program.

However, as a traditional payday and title lender, Advance America operates in a high-cost lending category. The website does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms—critical information for cost comparison. Title loans require vehicle ownership and collateral, creating repossession risk. The company's business model depends on short-term, high-interest lending, making it unsuitable for consumers seeking debt solutions or credit-building alternatives. Borrowers should research full terms before proceeding.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Loan amounts scale from $100 (accessible) to $25,000 (title loans), accommodating different needs
Physical store locations with extended hours (until 6pm weekdays) for in-person application and service
Bilingual customer service (Spanish-speaking staff) at physical locations
4.9-star average rating across 125,448+ Google reviews indicating consistent customer satisfaction
Online application option available for all loan types
Flexible installment loan repayment terms (longer than payday loans)
cons: APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website—critical terms hidden from comparison shopping
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
High-interest lending model typical of payday/title industry; unsuitable for debt management or credit repair
Payday loans are short-term (2-4 weeks) and not sustainable for chronic cash flow problems
No credit-building features; loans do not help establish or improve credit history
best_for: Workers facing genuine short-term cash flow gaps between paychecks who can repay quickly
Car owners with immediate urgent expenses who have vehicle equity and reliable income to repay title loans
Consumers in financial emergencies (medical, car repair) who have no other immediate funding options
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed consumers with genuine short-term cash needs and reliable income to repay within weeks. The critical caveat is that the website withholds APR and fee information—borrowers must contact the store or call (904) 781-7075 to learn the true cost before committing, as payday and title loans typically carry extremely high interest rates (often 400%+ APR) unsuitable for ongoing financial management.
services: Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with flexible repayment schedules)
Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 secured by vehicle equity)
Online loan applications for all product types
Extended store hours (weekday evenings, Saturday hours)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
